topics.title: Jet Li and Roast of William Shatner
topics.summary: The studio discusses a martial arts film starring Jet Li, shares a recording of a humorous phone call with a cab company, and reviews fan feedback regarding Artie Lange's appearance on the roast of William Shatner.

topics.title: Comedy Roast and Celebrity Commentary
topics.summary: The studio reviews a recent comedy roast featuring William Shatner and discusses various comedians' performances while addressing fan feedback regarding on-air content.

topics.title: Comedy Roast Highlights
topics.summary: The studio reviews various comedy performances and celebrity appearances, including segments featuring William Shatner, Lisa Lampanelli, and Andy Dick.

topics.title: Comedy Central Roast and Guest Commentary
topics.summary: The studio reviews highlights from a recent roast featuring William Shatner, Lisa Lampanelli, and other celebrities while discussing various guests' performances.

topics.title: Pop Music and Baseball Memories
topics.summary: The studio discusses current pop hits by artists like the Pussycat Dolls and Fergie before transitioning into a discussion about baseball, personal memories of attending games with fathers, and the emotional impact of sports.

topics.title: Father and Son Relationship Dynamics
topics.summary: The studio explores the complexities of father-son relationships through personal anecdotes about sports, childhood memories, and the generational differences in emotional communication.

topics.title: Father-Son Relationship Dynamics
topics.summary: The studio explores a man's personal reflections on his distant relationship with his father and the generational cycle of emotional unavailability.

topics.title: Isabella St. James on Life as a Playboy
topics.summary: The studio hosts interview Isabella St. James about her experiences living at the Playboy mansion, her relationship with Hugh Hefner, and the specific rules regarding his lifestyle and interactions with other men.

topics.title: Playboy Mansion Life and Bunny Tales
topics.summary: The studio features Isabella St. James discussing her experiences at the Playboy Mansion, the details of her book "Bunny Tales," and the specific lifestyle and perks provided to the women living there.

topics.title: Isabella St. James Discusses Playboy Mansion Experience
topics.summary: The show features Isabella St. James discussing her time at the Playboy mansion, her decision to write a book about the experience, and the distinction between her reality and the public image of the lifestyle.

topics.title: Beetlejuice and Medication Side Effects
topics.summary: The studio features a conversation regarding Beetlejuice’s mood, his use of Paxil for depression, and the impact of medication on his personal life.

topics.title: Beetlejuice Guest Appearance and Call-ins
topics.summary: The show features a series of interactive phone calls with various callers, including an aggressive exchange with Alice, a discussion about pitbull fighting, and a segment featuring a preacher before concluding with promotional announcements for upcoming events.

topics.title: Paris Hilton and Accutane Side Effects
topics.summary: The studio discusses Paris Hilton's musical career and public image before transitioning to a discussion on the health risks associated with the acne medication Accutane.

topics.title: Mary Carey and Brooke Hogan Correspondence
topics.summary: The studio discusses a letter from Brooke Hogan to Mary Carey regarding her behavior on the show and her comments about abortion.

topics.title: Medical Anomalies and Cultural News
topics.summary: The studio discusses a rare medical condition involving multiple penises, the health of film critic Roger Ebert, Madonna’s mystical water claims, and various sports and political news items.

topics.title: International Relations and Domestic News
topics.summary: The show covers a range of topics including the hunt for Osama bin Laden, U.S. aid to Lebanon to counter Hezbollah influence, updates on the John Benet Ramsey case, and various entertainment news segments.
